payload.answer: I can help capture this, but I need you to choose how to handle the ambiguity around “Sam from Goldman” before anything is saved.
repair_options: Add as a new separate memory: “Sam from Goldman mentioned that he likes Bill Evans.”
If this refers to an existing Sam, attach the preference to that Sam instead.
Keep both if there may be multiple people named Sam associated with Goldman.
Clarify Sam’s identity first, e.g. full name, team, role, or whether Goldman means Goldman Sachs.
